summary: Phase-02 implementation is architecturally sound and independent reruns of the validator, targeted tests, loop gate, and PR gate are green, but the worker evidence package silently omitted the required phase-scoped PR gate. Because this phase requires loop/PR closeout evidence and acceptance forbids skipped required checks, the phase must stay blocked until the evidence package is remediated.

blockers.title: Missing phase-scoped PR gate evidence in worker closeout
blockers.why: The active phase note requires green loop/PR gate evidence, and the governed workflow requires PR gate before closeout. The worker report listed only the loop gate, so a required closeout check was silently omitted from the phase evidence package.
blockers.remediation: Rerun the same phase through remediation/worker closeout, execute `python scripts/run_pr_gate.py --skip-session-check --changed-files registry/stack_conformance.yaml scripts/validate_stack_conformance.py tests/process/test_validate_stack_conformance.py docs/session_handoff.md docs/tasks/active/TASK-2026-03-26-continue-governed-module-phase-02-for-stack-conf.md`, and record that command/result in the worker report before resubmitting for acceptance.

blockers.title: Required evidence is missing
blockers.why: Worker report is missing executed PR gate evidence required by the phase closeout contract.
blockers.remediation: Produce the missing evidence and rerun acceptance.

blockers.title: Prohibited acceptance finding present
blockers.why: Silent omission of a required closeout check from the worker evidence package.
blockers.remediation: Resolve the prohibited condition and rerun acceptance.

evidence_gaps: Worker report is missing executed PR gate evidence required by the phase closeout contract.
prohibited_findings: Silent omission of a required closeout check from the worker evidence package.
